summary: Comprehensive testing of FinFlow Multi-Persona Fintech App. All 43 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional across all 3 personas (Individual, Shop Owner, CA) with mobile responsiveness verified. All requested features working: login, persona picker, dashboards, transactions, goals with what-if planner, SMS parser, shop ledger with credit/debit entries, CA client management with status badges, tasks, pricing page with INR formatting, dark mode toggle.
passed_tests: Login with admin@finflow.com / Admin@123
Persona picker shows 3 options (Individual, Shop Owner, CA)
Select Individual persona -> Individual dashboard loads with 4 KPI cards (Income, Expenses, Savings Rate, Net Worth)
Individual: Donut chart (Spending by Category) renders
Individual: Line chart (Income vs Expenses) renders
Individual: Goals preview section shows progress bars
Individual: Add income transaction (Salary ₹50,000)
Individual: Add expense transaction (Groceries ₹3,000)
Individual: Transactions page with search and SMS parser
Individual: Goals page - create a savings goal
Individual: What-if planner works (~18 months calculation)
Individual: Quick add savings buttons (+₹1,000, +₹5,000, +₹10,000)
Switch persona to Shop Owner via switch button
Shop Owner: Dashboard loads with KPIs (Today's Revenue, Cash in Hand, Pending Payments)
Shop Owner: Cash Summary card with Opening/Closing/Credited/Debited
Shop Owner: Weekly Cash Flow bar chart renders
Shop Owner: Today's Entries feed updates after adding
Shop Owner: Credit button opens bottom sheet, add credit entry
Shop Owner: Debit button opens bottom sheet, add debit entry
Shop Owner: Ledger navigation works
Switch persona to CA
CA: Dashboard loads with summary stats (Active Clients, Reports Due, Pending Tasks, Overdue)
CA: Add a client with status badge (On track, Overdue, Pending docs)
CA: Client list shows status badges with correct colors
CA: Tasks page - add and toggle tasks
CA: Task status toggle (pending -> completed)
Pricing page shows 3 tiers with INR pricing (₹99, ₹299, ₹999)
Pricing page shows 'Popular' badge on Shop Owner tier
Dark mode toggle works on all personas
INR formatting shows ₹ symbol correctly with Indian number system
SMS parser endpoint works (/api/sms/parse) - tested debit, credit, UPI SMS
Bottom navigation works on each persona
Mobile responsiveness verified for all personas

test_classes: TestAuth (6 tests) - login, register, logout, me endpoint
TestPersona (4 tests) - select individual/shop_owner/ca, invalid persona
TestIndividual (9 tests) - dashboard, transactions CRUD, goals CRUD
TestShopOwner (9 tests) - dashboard, credit/debit entries, ledger, pending payments
TestCA (9 tests) - dashboard, clients CRUD, tasks CRUD with status toggle
TestPricing (1 test) - pricing tiers with INR

critical_code_review_comments: All persona-specific endpoints properly protected with authentication
INR formatting utility (utils/inr.js) correctly handles Indian number system (Lakhs, Crores)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Bottom sheets for Shop Owner credit/debit entries work smoothly
Status badges (On track, Overdue, Pending docs) have correct color coding
seed_data_creation: Backend creates admin user on startup. Test data created during pytest run (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FinFlow Multi-Persona Fintech App fully tested. 3 personas: Individual (green #1D9E75), Shop Owner (amber #EF9F27), CA (blue #185FA5). Individual has KPI cards, donut/line charts, transactions with SMS parser, goals with what-if planner. Shop Owner has cash ledger, credit/debit quick entry via bottom sheets, daily summary, weekly chart, pending payments. CA has client list with status badges, task management with toggle. Pricing page shows 3 tiers (₹99/₹299/₹999). Dark mode and mobile responsiveness working. All 43 backend tests pass. No issues found.

design_review.persona_picker: 3 cards with distinct colors (green/amber/blue), background images, 'Get started' CTAs
design_review.individual_dashboard: 4 KPI cards in 2x2 grid, donut chart for spending, line chart for income vs expenses, goals preview
design_review.shop_dashboard: 3 KPI cards stacked, cash summary with credit/debit ratio bar, weekly bar chart, today's entries feed, fixed credit/debit buttons
design_review.ca_dashboard: 4 summary stats in 2x2 grid, client list with status badges, search functionality
design_review.pricing_page: 3 tier cards with features list, 'Popular' badge on Shop Owner, INR pricing
design_review.mobile_responsive: All personas stack properly, bottom navigation visible, touch-friendly buttons
